generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former NATO cyber defense strategist, I've seen firsthand how our over-reliance on foreign tech puts our national security at risk. Strategic autonomy isn't about isolation - it's about ensuring our critical infrastructure can withstand attacks while maintaining our democratic values. The recent cyber incident at our power grid (still underreported) showed exactly why we need domestic control over key technologies. This isn't about fear - it's about responsible preparedness. #SecureOurFuture #StrategicAutonomy
